name: google-shopping-monorepo
description: Monorepo of independently deployable Google Shopping Apify actors sharing @gs/shared, bundled per-actor with esbuild.

scripts.deploy:shopping: node scripts/build.mjs shopping && cd shopping && apify push
scripts.deploy:immersive: node scripts/build.mjs immersive && cd immersive && apify push
scripts.deploy:resolution: node scripts/build.mjs product-resolution && cd product-resolution && apify push
